description_long: This is a pair of intricately beaded earrings, each crafted in the shape of a six-pointed star or floral motif. The earrings are composed of small, colorful cylindrical beads arranged in concentric patterns, with a dominant palette of red, orange, yellow, white, and black. The beads are tightly woven together, creating a textured and dimensional surface. Each earring is attached to a simple metal fishhook ear wire, allowing for easy wear. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, with a handcrafted, artisanal quality. The earrings are lightweight and designed to dangle freely from the ear.
description: A pair of colorful, star-shaped beaded earrings with intricate floral patterns and metal hook attachments. The design is vibrant, textured, and handcrafted.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness and layered beadwork of a single earring, with the metal hook visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both earrings, revealing the full six-pointed star or floral pattern and the detailed arrangement of multicolored beads.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the profile and bead layering of a single earring.
description_view_3: Front view identical to view 1, showing the symmetrical, colorful star-shaped design of both earrings.
